items.description: No invented citation, finding, or page number in committed prose.
No auto generated Croatian empiric or domestic example in committed prose; such items stay co-author asks.
quarto preview of the chapter renders without error and callouts and citations resolve.
No open contradiction or double definition against the concept ledger at assembly.
book-style linter and the manual pass clear the STYLE.md hard rules.
book-figure detector finds a prose paragraph before every figure and each intro passes the style linter.
Every chapter not in conventions.json opener_exempt opens with the Vodič kroz poglavlje block.
Definicija blocks cover only the chapter spine key terms.
book-continuity terms check passes, no double definition or term used before introduction.
Definicija, figure, and callout counts sit inside the conventions bands.
Chapter has at least one student exercise (callout-vjezba).
Exercises use the chapter spine key terms, not only recall them.
Concepts are introduced before they are used.
